subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Lord! I beseech Thee by the lights of Thy Kingdom and the mysteries of Thy Dominion, and by Thy Name whereby Thou hast subdued Thine earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و سیدی اسئلک بانوار ملکوتک و اسرار جبروتک و باسمک الذی به سخرت ارضک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
